positive: A minimalist, high-contrast design of interconnected celestial elements and stylized botanical flora. Focus on crescent moons, delicate star trails, and interwoven fern fronds. The composition should be perfectly symmetrical, centering the main visual mass. Style: Neo-Art Deco meets mystical ethno-design. Lighting: Deep indigo and midnight blues contrasted sharply with luminous, pale gold and emerald green highlights. The artwork must have clean, sharp silhouettes and strong negative space suitable for a printed patch or t-shirt print. Vector quality, ornate yet modern.
negative: blur, blurry, artifact, watermark, signature, logo, text, low resolution, noise, grainy, abstract art, photorealistic, 3d render, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, busy background
